etymology_and_history.root_language: Language**: From "jolly" from Old French "jolif" (festive, merry)
etymology_and_history.original_meaning: Meaning**: Festive merry; having cheerful merry and jolly cheerfulness with merry presence
etymology_and_history.semantic_evolution: Evolution**: Festive merry → cheerful merry → contemporary jolly cheerfulness and jolly merry with cheerful presence
etymology_and_history.cultural_shifts: Shifts**: Festive merry → cheerful merry → jolly cheerfulness → cheerful understanding
